prompt: Transform this graph into a stacked area chart, with each area layered on top of another.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a line graph of social media traffic trends, by converting it into a stacked area chart. Each of the original lines (Facebook, Pinterest, Twitter, YouTube) should be transformed into a distinct, filled area, with these areas layered one on top of another to represent their cumulative sum, while retaining their original colors as shown in the legend.
objects: Chart Legend with Facebook, Pinterest, Twitter, YouTube
Blue filled area representing Facebook data
Red filled area representing Pinterest data
Green filled area representing Twitter data
Orange filled area representing YouTube data
